title: Food Expansion: Reimagined
description: Simple Mod, which adds new Food into the game. Now for newer versions!
body:
![Food Expansion: Reimagined](https://i.imgur.com/PcBSzcA.png)

First - All credit to [Lellson8](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lellson8/projects) for open sourcing his great mod, [Food Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/food-expansion). 

# Food Expansion: Reimagined

🔥**NEW**🔥 Now Available for **1.20.1**!

*(Please make sure you're downloading the corresponding version for your 1.19.x game, 1.19.4 mods are not compatible with 1.19.2 Minecraft, for example, due to a change in Creative Tabs)*

Food Expansion: Reimagined is a simple mod, which adds new food into the game. The mod is based around Vanilla Food and tries to enhance the Food System. 

This mod also increases the stack size to 64 of all vanilla and food expansion food items which return a bowl when eaten. They don't need to much inventory space now.

__You're allowed to use my mod in your modpack!__
